item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Adhybridhealthservice Addsservices Premiumcheck

query.description: The service property filter to apply.

The service type for the services onboarded to Azure Active Directory Connect Health. Depending on whether the service is monitoring, ADFS, Sync or ADDS roles, the service type can either be AdFederationService or AadSyncService or AdDomainService.
The skip count, which specifies the number of elements that can be bypassed from a sequence and then return the remaining elements.
The take count , which specifies the number of elements that can be returned from a sequence.
(Required) The version of the API to be used with the client request.

request.description: Gets the details of Active Directory Domain Services for a tenant having Azure AD Premium license and is onboarded to Azure Active Directory Connect Health.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

The skip count, which specifies the number of elements that can be bypassed from a sequence and then return the remaining elements.
The take count , which specifies the number of elements that can be returned from a sequence.
(Required) The version of the API to be used with the client request.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Adhybridhealthservice Services

query.description: The service property filter to apply.

The service type for the services onboarded to Azure Active Directory Connect Health. Depending on whether the service is monitoring, ADFS, Sync or ADDS roles, the service type can either be AdFederationService or AadSyncService or AdDomainService.
The skip count, which specifies the number of elements that can be bypassed from a sequence and then return the remaining elements.
The take count , which specifies the number of elements that can be returned from a sequence.
(Required) The version of the API to be used with the client request.

The skip count, which specifies the number of elements that can be bypassed from a sequence and then return the remaining elements.
The take count , which specifies the number of elements that can be returned from a sequence.
(Required) The version of the API to be used with the client request.
